message.content:
@startuml
actor client
participant fastAPI
database JobsCollection
entity Poller
boundary IngestService
control MappingIngestor
queue MongoSerializer
package DatabrokerCollections {
}
component SciCatIngestor
rectangle Catamel

client ->> fastAPI : file ready to ingest
activate fastAPI
fastAPI --> JobsCollection : create Job
deactivate fastAPI
Poller <-- JobsCollection : poll for job
Poller -> IngestService : ingest
activate IngestService
IngestService ..>> MappingIngestor : ingest
activate MappingIngestor
MappingIngestor -->> MongoSerializer : send docs
MongoSerializer -[hidden]right-> DatabrokerCollections : Persist docstream\n(deactivated)
SciCatIngestor <-[#08547E].- IngestService : ingest
activate SciCatIngestor
SciCatIngestor -.->[#D6272F]> Catamel : many messages\ndisabled by default
@enduml
